VJs TV is the global broadcast network for VJ culture, audiovisual performances, and digital visual art. Watch live performances, discover artists, and explore the world of visual performance.

Why VJs TV

The Most Targeted Reach in Live Visual Culture

Our audience doesn't just watch — they create. Every member is an active VJ, visual designer, or live performance technologist who purchases software, hardware, and tools to do their work.

✓
